title: Economy: Coins, Bills and Gems!
description: Add coins, bills and gems, for your sever economy.
body:
The economy mod you need, does not add crafts that break the economy and allows you to have that experience you are looking for on your server. Use it with your friends and have fun!


None of these items can be obtained in survival, and you cannot, for example, craft a more valuable currency with 4 less valuable ones, you decide their value and which ones to use on your server.
